collision energy: fragmentation in the LTQ was performed by collision-induced dissociation (normalized collision energy, 35%; activation Q, 0.250; activation time, 10 ms)
enrichment method: Following biotin-affinity capture, the biotinylated proteins were purified and analyzed by mass spectrometry
fragmentation method: fragmentation in the LTQ was performed by collision-induced dissociation
instrument: data were acquired with an LTQ Orbitrap Elite mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a nanoelectrospray ion source
